metadata.description: BistroMathWorks plugin marketplace — thinking tools for stress-testing plans, decisions, code, and real estate deals.

plugins.name: bistromath-thinking-tools
plugins.description: BistroMath Thinking Tools — adversarial plan grilling (grill-me and grill-with-docs, written by Matt Pocock and repackaged here with full credit — a great idea worth bundling), guided ideation (ideation-partner), Munger-style inversion for business decisions (never-lose) and code (munger), and Doolittle, the deal-side copilot for real estate agents.

plugins.name: bistromath-realestate-tools
plugins.description: BistroMath Real Estate Tools — 8 skills for working agents: comps and pricing (comp-crusher), listing marketing (listing-arsenal), open houses (open-house-machine), sphere nurture (sphere-engine), prospecting (prospector) — written by Miron Briley/CyclSales (MIT) and repackaged with full credit — plus BistroMathWorks originals: newsletter-analyzer, presentation-strategist, and offer-extractor for mortgage client emails.
